allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells"; Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Source })
